title: GreenLang Factor Record v0.1 Alpha (FROZEN)
description: FROZEN alpha contract for GreenLang Factors v0.1 Alpha (FY27 Q1). Narrower than factor_record_v1.schema.json. Every record produced by the 6 alpha-source parsers (IPCC AR6, DEFRA 2025, EPA GHG Hub 2025, EPA eGRID 2024, India CEA latest, EU CBAM defaults) MUST validate against this schema. Frozen 2026-04-25. Versioning policy: additive within v0.x; field removal/rename is a breaking change requiring a new $id (v0.2+). v1.0 GA will use a separate $id and is not substitutable for v0.1.

urn.description: Canonical public id. Format: urn:gl:factor:<source>:<namespace>:<id>:v<version>. Globally unique. Never changes. Examples: urn:gl:factor:ipcc-ar6:stationary-combustion:natural-gas-residential:v1, urn:gl:factor:epa-egrid:subregion-rfcw:2024-average:v1, urn:gl:factor:defra-2025:passenger-car-petrol-medium:km:v1, urn:gl:factor:india-cea-baseline:national-grid:2024-annual:v1.

factor_id_alias.description: Optional non-canonical alias retained for backward compatibility with the v1 schema's EF: identifier. SDK and API responses MUST treat `urn` as primary.

source_urn.description: URN of the upstream source (e.g., urn:gl:source:ipcc-ar6, urn:gl:source:defra-2025, urn:gl:source:epa-ghg-hub, urn:gl:source:epa-egrid, urn:gl:source:india-cea-baseline, urn:gl:source:eu-cbam-defaults). MUST resolve to a registered entry in greenlang/factors/data/source_registry.yaml.

factor_pack_urn.description: URN of the owning Factor Pack. Format: urn:gl:pack:<source>:<pack-id>:<version>. Every factor belongs to exactly one pack.

name.description: Human-readable display name (en-US). Example: 'Grid electricity, consumption mix, India'.

description.description: 2-3 sentence description that states the boundary and exclusions. Required for auditor readability.

category.description: Narrowed alpha category enum. Scope 3, freight, agricultural, waste, finance proxies are deferred to v0.5+. Note: v1 schema's broader factor_family enum is intentionally not adopted in alpha.

value.description: The numeric emission factor value, expressed in the unit identified by unit_urn. MUST be > 0.

unit_urn.description: URN of the unit. Examples: urn:gl:unit:kgco2e/kwh, urn:gl:unit:kgco2e/kg, urn:gl:unit:kgco2e/tkm, urn:gl:unit:kgco2e/l.

gwp_basis.description: Alpha is AR6-only. AR4/AR5 multi-basis support is deferred to v0.5+.

gwp_horizon.description: GWP time horizon in years. 100 is the default for corporate inventories; 20 for short-lived climate forcers; 500 rare. Ships pinned to 100 in alpha unless explicitly required by source.

geography_urn.description: URN of the geography. Examples: urn:gl:geo:country:in, urn:gl:geo:country:us, urn:gl:geo:country:gb, urn:gl:geo:subregion:eu-27, urn:gl:geo:grid_zone:egrid-rfcw, urn:gl:geo:state_or_province:us-tx, urn:gl:geo:global:world.

vintage_start.description: Earliest date covered by this factor (ISO 8601 YYYY-MM-DD).

vintage_end.description: Latest date covered by this factor (ISO 8601 YYYY-MM-DD). MUST be >= vintage_start.

resolution.description: Time resolution. Most alpha factors are annual; hourly grid intensity is deferred to v2.5.

methodology_urn.description: URN of the methodology. Examples: urn:gl:methodology:ipcc-tier-1-stationary-combustion, urn:gl:methodology:ghgp-corporate-scope2-location, urn:gl:methodology:ghgp-corporate-scope2-market, urn:gl:methodology:eu-cbam-default.

boundary.description: Free-text statement of what is included and excluded. Auditor-facing.

uncertainty.description: Optional in alpha; required from v0.9+. When present: {distribution: 'lognormal'|'normal'|'uniform'|'triangular', mean?: number, stddev?: number, p2_5?: number, p97_5?: number, pedigree?: object}.

licence_constraints.description: Optional. {redistribution: 'allowed'|'attribution'|'restricted'|'forbidden', attribution_required: bool, caching_seconds?: integer, notes?: string}.

citations.description: DOIs, URLs, publication references, table/section refs. At least one citation required.

supersedes_urn.description: URN of the prior factor this record replaces. Set on revisions.

published_at.description: When this factor record was published to the production catalogue. Immutable after publish.

deprecated_at.description: If deprecated, when. Once set, never reset to null.

source_url.description: Canonical landing URL for the source. Example: https://www.gov.uk/government/collections/government-conversion-factors-for-company-reporting-of-greenhouse-gas-emissions

source_record_id.description: Stable identifier of the row/cell within the source artefact. Example: 'sheet=Stationary_Combustion;row=42'.

source_publication.description: Title or DOI of the source publication. Example: 'UK DESNZ GHG Conversion Factors 2025 - Full Set'.

source_version.description: Upstream version pin (e.g., '2025.1' for DEFRA, '2024.0' for eGRID, 'AR6-WG3-Annex-III' for IPCC, 'CBAM-Reg-2023/956-Annex-III'). Required for reproducibility.

raw_artifact_uri.description: S3-compatible URI to the immutable raw artefact (PDF/CSV/XLSX/JSON). Example: s3://greenlang-factors-raw/desnz/2025/conversion-factors-full.xlsx.

raw_artifact_sha256.description: SHA-256 (lowercase hex) over the raw artefact bytes.

parser_id.description: Dotted module path of the parser (e.g., 'greenlang.factors.ingestion.parsers.desnz_uk').

parser_version.description: Semver of the parser at extraction time.

parser_commit.description: Git commit SHA of the parser code.

row_ref.description: Sheet/table/page/row reference within the raw artefact. Example: 'Sheet=Refrigerants; Row=12; Column=GWP_AR6'.

ingested_at.description: When the parser ingested this record.

operator.description: Identity of who/what ran the extraction. 'bot:parser_<id>' for automated ingest; 'human:<email>' for manual hot-fix.

extraction.description: Provenance of extraction. Every field MANDATORY in alpha (CTO doc §19.1: 'provenance fields complete for alpha sources').

review_status.description: Lifecycle. Only 'approved' records are visible in production. 'pending' lives in staging namespace; 'rejected' kept for audit.

reviewer.description: Email of the methodology lead or delegated reviewer.

approved_by.description: Email of the approver. REQUIRED when review_status == 'approved' (enforced by allOf below).

approved_at.description: When approval was granted. REQUIRED when review_status == 'approved'.

diff_from_source_uri.description: Optional URI to a diff report between the parsed record and the prior version.

review.description: Review metadata. CTO doc §19.1 acceptance: 'Licence tagging: every factor in production carries a licence tag that matches its source' AND only methodology-lead-approved records flip to production.
